final_prompt.prompt:
Create a 3x3 grid layout poster for Xiaohongshu (Little Red Book) social media, designed as nine separate cards that can be cleanly sliced into individual posts.

Style/medium: clean editorial design, soft ins-style aesthetic, gentle photorealistic textures with light skeuomorphic illustrations, magazine-quality layout
Composition: 3-column × 3-row grid with clear borders and spacing between cells, each cell self-contained and centered, generous white space, no text near cut lines
Subject: sleep wellness content series featuring 8 tips for better sleep, feminine lifestyle health theme
Scene/backdrop: warm cream and oat color palette (cream white, light beige, pale oatmeal, soft caramel) with deep brown text, cozy bedroom atmosphere
Lighting/mood: soft diffused warm lighting, peaceful and healing mood, gentle shadows
Color palette: monochromatic warm neutrals — cream white base, light beige and oatmeal mid-tones, soft caramel accents, deep brown for typography
Materials/textures: soft cotton bedding textures, matte paper feel, subtle grain, smooth ceramic for cups, warm wood for furniture
Text (verbatim): "让你倒头就睡的8个 tips", "失眠党、熬夜党一定要收藏", "1. 睡前1小时别玩手机", "蓝光会让大脑更清醒，越刷越睡不着。", "2. 睡前把灯光调暗", "暖光环境能帮助身体进入"准备睡觉"的状态。", "3. 房间温度别太高", "稍微凉一点，更容易快速入睡。", "4. 晚上别喝浓茶咖啡", "咖啡因会延迟困意，让你躺很久还睡不着。", "5. 睡前洗个热水澡", "能让身体放松下来，入睡速度更快。", "6. 脑子停不下来就写下来", "把烦心事和待办清单写下，大脑会更容易放松。", "7. 固定上床时间", "每天差不多时间睡，生物钟会越来越稳定。", "8. 试试深呼吸放松法", "吸气4秒，停4秒，呼气6秒，慢慢就有困意了。", "收藏这组，今晚试试看"
Constraints: must be exactly 3x3 grid with visible dividers; each cell must work as standalone image; all text in Chinese only; grid lines must not cut through text or illustrations; consistent visual style across all 9 cells
Avoid: cheap marketing aesthetic, overly flashy decorations, cluttered layout, text too close to grid borders, mixed languages, deformed hands or faces, watermark, 8K stuffer words
